particulars.description: The old brewery the broadway newbury berkshire.

F/H property k/a land at hambridge lane greenham newbury t/no's BK64348,BK139723 and BK369020 together with all buildings and fixtures (including trade fixtures). Fixed plant and machinery thereon. By way of assignment the goodwill of the business (if any), the full benefit of all licences and all guarantees. By way of fixed charge the shares and all rights, benefits and advantages arising in respect thereof. By way of assignment the intellectual property rights.
